name: Wnet Telecom USA
notes: WNET is intensively developing peering with CDNs, global carriers, and local ISPs with a significant customer base. Facts and numbers about WNET: 11 countries, 100+ cities, 40+ IXPs, 9000km of metro fiber networks with 7500+ OnNet POPs. 2000+ direct peering across the globe. The core services are IP-Transit, MPLS/VPN transport, last miles, B2B and B2C internet access, IT services, colocation, and voice.
